ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Number of people in the district */,
  "area_in_hectares" REAL /* Total area of the district in hectares */,
  "number_of_jlgs" INTEGER /* Number of JLGs currently active in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jlg_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the campaign was conducted */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants in the campaign */,
  "number_of_jlgs_formed" INTEGER /* Number of new JLGs formed during the campaign */,
  "number_of_jlgs_activated" INTEGER /* Number of JLGs activated during the campaign */,
  "total_area_converted" REAL /* Total area of land converted into cultivable land during the campaign */,
  "number_of_enterprises_formed" INTEGER /* Number of new enterprises formed during the campaign */,
  "number_of_ah_units_started" INTEGER /* Number of AH units started during the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jlg_campaigns_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jlg_participation" (
  "participation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participation event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the JLG participated in */,
  "jlg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JLG that participated */,
  "participation_date" TEXT /* Date of participation */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the JLG */,
  "program_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the participation (e.g., success, partial success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jlg_participation_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jlg_formation" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the JLG was formed under */,
  "jlg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the new JLG formed */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date of formation */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the newly formed JLG */,
  "formation_type" TEXT /* Type of formation (e.g., community-driven, government-supported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jlg_formation_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jlg_activation" (
  "activation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activation event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the JLG was activated under */,
  "jlg_id" INTEGER /* ID of the JLG activated */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date of activation */,
  "number_of_members" INTEGER /* Number of members in the activated JLG */,
  "activation_type" TEXT /* Type of activation (e.g., through training, through funding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jlg_activation_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_conversion" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion event */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the land conversion occurred */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the land conversion was part of */,
  "area_in_hectares" REAL /* Area of land converted in hectares */,
  "land_type_before_conversion" TEXT /* Type of land before conversion (e.g., fallow, barren) */,
  "land_type_after_conversion" TEXT /* Type of land after conversion (e.g., cultivable, irrigated) */,
  "conversion_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the conversion */,
  "conversion_method" TEXT /* Method used for conversion (e.g., mechanical, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_conversion_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_conversion_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enterprises" (
  "enterprise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enterprise */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the enterprise was formed */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the enterprise was formed under */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date of formation */,
  "enterprise_type" TEXT /* Type of enterprise (e.g., agricultural, processing) */,
  "investment_amount" REAL /* Total investment amount for the enterprise */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the enterprise */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue generated by the enterprise */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enterprise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enterprises_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enterprises_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ah_units" (
  "ah_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each AH unit */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the AH unit was started */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the AH unit was started under */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the AH unit was started */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of AH unit (e.g., seed, fertilizer, machinery) */,
  "services_provided" TEXT /* List of services provided by the AH unit */,
  "number_of_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries of the AH unit */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated for the AH unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ah_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ah_units_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ah_units_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES jlg_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "value_addition_units" (
  "value_addition_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value addition unit */,
  "ah_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the AH unit the value addition unit is part of */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the value addition unit was started */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of value addition unit (e.g., processing, packaging) */,
  "services_provided" TEXT /* List of services provided by the value addition unit */,
  "number_of_beneficiaries" INTEGER /* Number of beneficiaries of the value addition unit */,
  "annual_budget" REAL /* Annual budget allocated for the value addition unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_addition_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_value_addition_units_ah_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("ah_unit_id") REFERENCES ah_units ("ah_unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, data analyst, field officer) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
